goal: Conduct a rigorous forensic audit of the v10 microstructure overlay result to confirm, downgrade, or reject it as a genuine improvement over the immutable baseline.
global_constraints: v11 is audit-only: no new features, no new directional scouts, no early-cut, no label changes.
Immutable reference is active-signal-v1@1 — never modify the baseline.
All comparisons must use the same lockbox window for base and overlay.
Short-only, long-only, and combined veto must be tested as separate runs — never aggregated into a single story.
Leakage, reference, window, and snapshot audits must complete before any interpretive conclusion.
Simple rule-based overlay must be validated before model-backed overlay.
PROMOTE status is only valid if v10 survives the entire forensic cycle.

slices.title: Negative controls and robustness
slices.hypothesis: Stress-test the overlay result with placebo thresholds, perturbations, time-slice splits, and cross-side misapplication to rule out random-artifact fit.
slices.objective: Stress-test the overlay result with placebo thresholds, perturbations, time-slice splits, and cross-side misapplication to rule out random-artifact fit.
success_criteria: Robustness verdict per test: result is stable across perturbations, or fragile with specific break-points documented.
evidence_requirements: Robustness verdict per test: result is stable across perturbations, or fragile with specific break-points documented.

slices.title: Final v11 forensic verdict
slices.hypothesis: Render the final forensic verdict on the v10 microstructure overlay: CONFIRMED, DOWNGRADED TO WATCHLIST, or REJECTED.
slices.objective: Render the final forensic verdict on the v10 microstructure overlay: CONFIRMED, DOWNGRADED TO WATCHLIST, or REJECTED.
success_criteria: Final forensic verdict recorded with full justification chain.
evidence_requirements: Final forensic verdict recorded with full justification chain.
